search.query: | tstats count where index=$db_index$ by source | table source

index=$db_index$ source=$db_source$ $drillfi_filters_spl$ | head 10000 | eval Flag = _bkt."|"._cd."|".host."|".index."|".source."|"._time | lookup apps.csv title AS Flag OUTPUTNEW export AS lookup_match | eval Flag = if(lookup_match="1", Flag."|1", Flag."|0") | where match(Flag, ".*\|"."$flagged$". "$") | eval _time = strftime(_time, "%F %T.%3N") | table Flag _time $field1$ | sort _time | `remove_fields`

| inputlookup apps.csv | append [stats count | eval title = "$event_to_add$" | eval export = 0 | fields - count] | stats max(export) as export by title | eval export = if(title="$event_to_add$", 1-export, export) | where export=1 | outputlookup apps.csv

| inputlookup apps.csv | table title | eval metadataParts = split(title, "|") | eval bkt = mvindex(metadataParts, 0), cd = mvindex(metadataParts, 1), host = mvindex(metadataParts, 2), index = mvindex(metadataParts, 3), source = mvindex(metadataParts, 4), _time = mvindex(metadataParts, 5) | eval timeMinusOne = tonumber(_time) - 1, timePlusOne = tonumber(_time) + 1 | table bkt, cd, host, index, source, timeMinusOne, timePlusOne, title | map search="| search index=\"$$index$$\" source=\"$$source$$\" host=\"$$host$$\" earliest=$$timeMinusOne$$ latest=$$timePlusOne$$ | where _bkt=\"$$bkt$$\" AND _cd=\"$$cd$$\"" maxsearches=200 | eval Flag = _bkt."|"._cd."|".host."|".index."|".source."|"._time."|1" | eval _time = strftime(_time, "%F %T.%3N") | table Flag _time $field1$
